title: NDIC Condolence Visit To Dr. Herbert Wigwe Parent - FinancialEDGE
description: NDIC Executive Management delegation led by MD/CE, Mr. Bello Hassan gives some words of comfort to Elder Shyngle and Mama Stella Wigwe, parents of late Access Bank MD/CEO, Dr. Herbert Wigwe during a condolence.
html: NDIC Executive Management delegation led by MD/CE, Mr. Bello Hassan gives some words of comfort to Elder Shyngle and Mama Stella Wigwe, parents of late Access Bank MD/CEO, Dr. Herbert Wigwe during a condolence.
